title: astragalus plebeius
intro: Astragalus plebeius, also known as the dwarf milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus plebeius include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. Astragalus plebeius is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
